description: Write the architecture documentation/runbook for the new split after implementation. Scope: describe marketing/static content ownership, Vite patient app ownership, API Gateway/Lambda backend ownership, CloudFront routing, local development, deployment workflows, Cognito/session-cookie behavior, CORS/CSRF posture, webhook ingress, and thin-PHI boundaries. Include a route table showing which system owns each path. Document that MDI is the clinical system of record and Apoth does not persist questionnaire answers after submission. Acceptance criteria: docs are updated in the repo; onboarding a developer no longer requires knowing the historical Next API/static-export confusion; deployment/runbook steps are accurate for staging and production.
title: Document final split architecture for marketing, patient app, and Lambda APIs
